recommendation: Set v5.0 as Skillful Actor Runtime: each actor receives a skill packet, capability fit, resource access, policy constraints, and expected output contract before work starts.
rationale: v4.0 made runtime state human-recognizable; the next leverage point is making the organization itself more capable, so the interface can show better real decisions rather than prettier summaries.
signals: Do not spend v5.0 on decorative viewer expansion.
